chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl.Misc.Appln No.106 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For orders on M.A No. 1608 of 2025 2. For hearing of case. 17.04.2025 Mr. Kanwar Altaf Bhatti, Advocate for the Applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl.Prosecutor General ************* Through the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, the applicant assailed order dated 28.10.2024 passed by the learned Session Judge, Malir, Karachi whereby an application moved under Section 516-A Cr.PC was dismissed. 2. Heard and perused. 3. Record reflects that vehicle bearing registration No.BD-9852, Engine No.1811737, Chasis No. KD/120-0100017, Model 2006 was robbed from one Muhammad Imran for which a FIR was registered bearing crime No. 147 of 2014, under Section 392/34 PPC Police Station Sohrab Goth Karachi. Apparently, vehicle was registered in the name of M/s New Hampshire Insurance Company, who authorized present applicant to contest the legal proceedings before the Court of Law such letter is available at Page 65 of the Court File. Letter of subrogation was also issued in favour of Irfan Ahmed which is also available at Page 23 of the Court File. There is a verification letter from M/s New Hampshire Insurance Company with regard to the claim settled by the Company with the participants available at Court file at Page 69. Apart from above, there is no other claimant from public at large to come forward before this Court to claim possession of vehicle in question. 4. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands allowed. The possession of vehicle bearing registration No.BD-9852, Engine No.1811737, Chasis No.

Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands allowed. The possession of vehicle bearing registration No.BD-9852, Engine No.1811737, Chasis No. KD/120-0100017, Model 2006 is restored to the applicant upon furnishing superdiginama. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application stand disposed of. J U D G E brohips
